positive: A stylized, minimalist composition featuring a group of diverse, joyful animals—a fox, a wise owl, a playful badger, and a curious rabbit—interacting in a magical, enchanted forest clearing. The style should be sophisticated modern vector illustration with a clean, solid silhouette aesthetic, utilizing a limited palette of deep forest greens, warm earthy browns, and accents of luminous teal and gold. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly contrasted, designed to look excellent on apparel. Use bold, defined outlines and negative space strategically. The overall mood should be whimsical, serene, and slightly fantastical. Flat graphic design, highly legible, printable, vibrant colors, studio lighting.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, grainy, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, ugly, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, cropped, artifacts, noise, low detail, bokeh, messy, cluttered
